# VainF DeepLabV3+ source notice

The files under `network/` and `LICENSE` are copied without source changes
from [VainF/DeepLabV3Plus-Pytorch](https://github.com/VainF/DeepLabV3Plus-Pytorch),
branch `master`, on 2026-07-17.

The source is distributed under the included MIT license. Package marker files
outside the upstream `network/` directory are project integration files.
`source_manifest.json` records the Git blob identifier and local SHA-256 for
every copied upstream file.
